name: Stuffed Crawfish Beignets
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper 1 lb Crawfish tails.
2. Mix 1/4 cup Shredded cheddar cheese with 1/4 cup Shredded Swiss cheese.
3. Add 1 1/2 tablespoons Chopped green onion and 1 1/2 tablespoons Chopped parsley to the crawfish tails, stirring until well combined.
4. Prepare dough: Combine 2 cups Bisquick with 3/4 cup Water in a bowl. Stir until just mixed.
5. Roll out the dough on a well-floured surface into a circle about 4 inches in diameter.
6. Place half of the crawfish filling on one half of the dough.
7. Fold the dough over the filling, then seal the edges with a fork dipped in flour.
8. Heat vegetable oil in a deep pot to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Fry beignets until golden brown, turning occasionally.
10. Serve warm. Makes about 16 beignets. May be frozen before frying. Thaw for 10 minutes and fry as usual. To make this dish quickly, try using a can of refrigerated biscuits. Use the same filling and frying method.
